https://openalex.org/W2948853410.kf1: [Likely wrong-author match] Argues bar associations can be catalysts for court reform.

https://openalex.org/W4409813135.demographics: Socially and ethnically diverse families with children 0-36 months across the four UK nations
https://openalex.org/W4409813135.kf1: Nearly all homes had Wi-Fi and many digital devices; very young children engaged in varied digital activities alone and with parents, and parents' mediation was shaped by their own digital practices/attitudes, with implications for children's digital rights.

https://openalex.org/W7125273975.kf1: Developed and validated the 15-item Parental Attitudes to Digital Technology Scale (PADTS) with a four-factor structure (perceived risks, learning benefits, confidence, technology anxiety) and measurement invariance across gender, ethnicity, region.

https://openalex.org/W7154709674.design: Atmospheric physics methods study (likely author mismatch – not ECD)
https://openalex.org/W7154709674.kf1: [Likely wrong-author match] Formvar method to capture atmospheric ice crystals and retrieve roughness parameters.

https://openalex.org/W4388014374.demographics: Country-level child development and nurturing-care indicators
https://openalex.org/W4388014374.kf1: Country-level improvements in provision of nurturing care over 10 years were associated with improvements in child development outcomes across 31 countries.

https://openalex.org/W4404642920.demographics: Nationally representative males and females aged 13-24
https://openalex.org/W4404642920.kf1: Strong associations between lifetime violence and recent mental distress; being in work modified this association (mitigating in Colombian girls, exacerbating in Nigerian boys), varying by country, sex, and age.
https://openalex.org/W4404642920.effect_sizes: Colombia girls aOR 0.42 (working) vs 6.12 (not working); Nigeria boys aOR 2.10 (working) vs 0.99 (not working)

https://openalex.org/W4404604318.demographics: Early childhood care and education aid flows to 134 LMICs
https://openalex.org/W4404604318.kf1: Lower-bound ECCE aid totalled US$3,646M (1.7% of education aid) over 2007-2021; conflict-affected countries received ~US$0.3/child vs US$1.2/child elsewhere, far below UNICEF's suggested 10% minimum.
https://openalex.org/W4404604318.effect_sizes: ECCE aid US$3,646M = 1.7% of education aid; conflict US$0.3 vs non-conflict US$1.2 per child

https://openalex.org/W4399324374.demographics: Children under five across 18 LAC countries
https://openalex.org/W4399324374.kf1: Access to water and sanitation was positively associated with early childhood development and reduced stunting; improved garbage collection was associated with lower stunting and underweight.

https://openalex.org/W4408090345.kf1: Reviews evidence linking climate change to adverse physical and mental health and emerging effects on child development and family systems (early marriage, fertility, migration, parenting), identifying major literature gaps.

https://openalex.org/W4409257810.demographics: Children and caregivers in the context of climate change
https://openalex.org/W4409257810.kf1: Argues nurturing care by caregivers is a critical buffer protecting child development against climate-change impacts, yet is largely absent from climate research and policy.

https://openalex.org/W4387048873.intervention_name: ASSIST or Dead Cool smoking-prevention programs
https://openalex.org/W4387048873.demographics: Secondary-school adolescents in Northern Ireland and Bogotá, Colombia
https://openalex.org/W4387048873.kf1: Both selection homophily (32.8%) and peer influence (39.2%) contributed to friends' smoking/vaping similarity; selection homophily was stronger in Bogotá and peer influence stronger in Northern Ireland.
https://openalex.org/W4387048873.effect_sizes: Selection homophily ORs 0.87-1.26; peer influence βs 0.07-0.55

https://openalex.org/W4386751845.demographics: Pupils completing GCSEs (2011-2013 cohorts), Northern Ireland
https://openalex.org/W4386751845.kf1: Socio-economic status effects on GCSE attainment are multidimensional; mother's education had the largest impact and free-school-meal eligibility remained an important predictor; girls outperformed boys.

https://openalex.org/W4402390727.kf1: Poor physical and mental health were negatively associated with post-primary attainment in Northern Ireland.

https://openalex.org/W4416717975.kf1: Editorial introducing seven articles on inclusion of children with social-emotional/behavioural needs in early education, emphasizing co-construction, empowerment, and reflective educator practice.

https://openalex.org/W4413409639.kf1: Very bad self-reported health, physical and mental health conditions, and limiting illness were all negatively associated with GCSE attainment.
https://openalex.org/W4413409639.effect_sizes: Very bad health d=-1.01; mental health condition d=-0.91; physical condition d=-0.39; limiting illness d=-0.98

https://openalex.org/W4415781815.intervention_name: ASSIST and Dead Cool smoking-prevention programs
https://openalex.org/W4415781815.demographics: Secondary-school adolescents in Northern Ireland and Bogotá
https://openalex.org/W4415781815.kf1: Peer influence on smoking/vaping norms was moderated by setting, intervention, gender, school SES, personality, and network position; effects were stronger among girls and lower-SES schools.

https://openalex.org/W4416505020.kf1: The Nourish arm significantly increased diet diversity among 10-11-year-olds (school DDS adjusted mean difference 2.79; total DDS 1.55) but not among 6-7-year-olds; diet quality was unchanged.

https://openalex.org/W4407165977.kf1: 100% school retention and high acceptability; impact occurred through social learning, experiential learning, engaging content, and real-life connections; lack of time was the main barrier.

https://openalex.org/W7162766519.kf1: Policy brief summarizing evidence that students' physical and mental health affect GCSE attainment in Northern Ireland.

https://openalex.org/W7118918012.demographics: Children aged 5-6 in socioeconomically disadvantaged communities
https://openalex.org/W7118918012.kf1: Crescendo had significant positive effects on music skills and behavioural self-regulation, with moderate effects on self-regulation (d=0.29) and reaction to music (d=0.21).
https://openalex.org/W7118918012.effect_sizes: Self-regulation d=0.29; reaction to music d=0.21

https://openalex.org/W4388199202.country: Bangladesh; Brazil; Colombia; India; Jordan; Lebanon; Mexico; Nigeria; South Africa
https://openalex.org/W4388199202.demographics: Young children and caregivers affected by crisis/displacement
https://openalex.org/W4388199202.kf1: Documents Sesame Workshop's adaptation of formative research (in-person and remote methods) for Watch, Play, Learn videos serving children affected by crisis and displacement across nine countries.

https://openalex.org/W4400332074.kf1: Reflects on bridging research and practice in producing Sesame Street and its international co-productions, offering a model for media makers to close the research-practice gap.

https://openalex.org/W4394607915.country: United States; Latin America; Middle East
https://openalex.org/W4394607915.demographics: Refugee and migrant children affected by conflict/displacement
https://openalex.org/W4394607915.kf1: Describes how diverse media distribution platforms can support young displaced children's coping strategies, with lessons on content curation, local advisors, and on-the-ground partners.

https://openalex.org/W4385554538.kf1: Methodological work on quantifying brain metabolites over large brain volumes via 3D echo-planar spectroscopic imaging.

https://openalex.org/W4387023707.demographics: Adults who smoke daily vs nonsmokers
https://openalex.org/W4387023707.biomarkers: MR spectroscopy neurometabolites (N-acetyl compounds, glutamate, creatine, choline, myo-inositol)
https://openalex.org/W4387023707.kf1: Smoking was associated with a hypoinflammatory neurometabolite profile in the dorsal anterior cingulate cortex; glutamate and creatine correlated negatively with tobacco dependence.

https://openalex.org/W4401441494.demographics: Adults with methamphetamine use disorder vs controls
https://openalex.org/W4401441494.kf1: No evidence of mGlu5 downregulation in methamphetamine use disorder; mGlu5 was higher in nonsmokers, and prefrontal mGlu5 correlated with verbal learning.

https://openalex.org/W4404219586.demographics: Community volunteers and patients with psychiatric diagnoses
https://openalex.org/W4404219586.kf1: Confirmatory factor analysis of 18 cognitive tests supported a three-factor structure (verbal/working memory, inhibitory control, memory); several inhibitory-control measures showed weak convergent validity.
